title: sorghum dochna var. wightii
intro: Sorghum dochna var. wightii, also known as Kudrungs or Indian sorghum, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sorghum family (Sorghum). It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Sorghum dochna var. wightii include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. Herbal preparations of Sorghum dochna var. wightii include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be consumed as teas, capsules, or applied topically to the skin.
